creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 193403
py-django-recaptcha-1.4.0.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch from svn that updates www/py-django-recaptcha to 1.4.0.

Changes by upstream:
- https://github.com/praekelt/django-recaptcha/compare/1.1.0...1.4.0

Changes to the port:
- changed RUN_DEPENDS to Django 1.11
- added LICENSE and LICENSE_FILE

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 and py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
